title: Expression and Purification of mCherry-tagged FYVE domain
author: Elisabeth Holzer

steps.title: Inoculate E
steps.instruction: Inoculate E. coli Rosetta™ (DE3) pLysS cells harboring the plasmid into 2× TY medium and incubate at 37 °C with shaking.

steps.title: Monitor the culture’s OD₆₀₀
steps.instruction: Monitor the culture’s OD₆₀₀. When it reaches approximately 0.4, reduce the temperature to 18 °C .

steps.title: Continue incubation until OD₆₀₀ reaches ~0
steps.instruction: Continue incubation until OD₆₀₀ reaches ~0.8.

steps.title: Induce protein expression by adding IPTG...
steps.instruction: Induce protein expression by adding IPTG to a final concentration of 100 micromolar (µM) .

steps.title: Incubate the culture at 18 °C for 16:00:00 with shaking
steps.instruction: Incubate the culture at 18 °C for 16:00:00 with shaking.

steps.title: Harvest cells by centrifugation at 4000...
steps.instruction: Harvest cells by centrifugation at 4000 x g, °C, for 00:20:00 at 4 °C .

steps.title: Wash the pellet once with ice-cold...
steps.instruction: Wash the pellet once with ice-cold 1× PBS (optional), then flash-freeze in liquid nitrogen and store at -80 °C until purification.

steps.title: Resuspend cell pellets in ice-cold lysis buffer
steps.instruction: Resuspend cell pellets in ice-cold lysis buffer.

steps.title: Lyse cells by sonication On ice (2× 30 sec, 60%)
steps.instruction: Lyse cells by sonication On ice (2× 30 sec, 60%).

steps.title: Clarify lysates by centrifugation at 20000...
steps.instruction: Clarify lysates by centrifugation at 20000 rpm, °C, for 00:45:00 at 4 °C using a Hitachi Himac CR22N centrifuge (R20A2 rotor).

steps.title: Filter the supernatant through a 0
steps.instruction: Filter the supernatant through a 0.45 µm filter.

steps.title: Load the filtered lysate onto a...
steps.instruction: Load the filtered lysate onto a pre-equilibrated 5 mL HisTrap HP column (Cytiva).

steps.title: Equilibrate a 5 mL HisTrap HP...
steps.instruction: Equilibrate a 5 mL HisTrap HP column with water followed by Buffer A.

steps.title: Load the clarified lysate onto the column
steps.instruction: Load the clarified lysate onto the column.

steps.title: Wash with three column volumes of Buffer A
steps.instruction: Wash with three column volumes of Buffer A.

steps.title: Elute bound protein using a stepwise...
steps.instruction: Elute bound protein using a stepwise imidazole gradient (30, 75, 100, 150,225, 300 mM) by increasing the proportion of Buffer B.

steps.title: Analyze elution fractions via SDS-PAGE and Coomassie staining
steps.instruction: Analyze elution fractions via SDS-PAGE and Coomassie staining.

steps.title: Pool fractions containing the protein and...
steps.instruction: Pool fractions containing the protein and concentrate using a 10 kDa cut-off Amicon Ultra filter.

steps.title: Further purify the concentrated sample by...
steps.instruction: Further purify the concentrated sample by SEC using a Superdex 200 Increase 10/300 GL column equilibrated in SEC buffer.

steps.title: Identify protein-containing fractions by SDS-PAGE
steps.instruction: Identify protein-containing fractions by SDS-PAGE.

steps.title: Pool, concentrate, aliquot, snap-freeze in liquid...
steps.instruction: Pool, concentrate, aliquot, snap-freeze in liquid nitrogen, and store at -80 °C .
